content.full_text:
January 28, 1977


Honorable Charles H. Phillips
Los Angeles County Superior Court
111 North Hill Street
Los Angeles, CA  90012

                                                Re:  Statement of Economic Interest

Dear Judge Phillips:

     Enclosed as you requested please find Form
721 for filing of your Statement of Economic Interest.
I am sorry that these materials were not forwarded to
you sooner.

     I also wish to confirm that the deadline for
filing your statement is March 1, 1977, in accordance
with 2 Cal. Adm. Code Section 18723.

                                                Sincerely yours,


                                                Jeanne Pritchard
                                                Administrative Assistant
                                                Executive Division

JP:plh
Enclosures

sections.question_synthetic: Not applicable - this is administrative correspondence regarding Statement of Economic Interest filing requirements.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is procedural/administrative correspondence, not an advice letter with legal question and conclusion sections. It contains a deadline confirmation referencing Cal. Code Section 19723. No substantive legal guidance provided.

embedding.summary: Administrative letter from FPPC staff enclosing Form 721 (Statement of Economic Interest) and confirming the filing deadline of March 1, 1977 for Judge Charles H. Phillips.
